ideation: This animation sequence will portray a penguin's characteristic waddle.  The robot will mimic the side-to-side motion of a penguin's walk by swaying its arms in a rhythmic pattern.  The arms will remain relatively low to the ground to depict the penguin's posture.  The small variation in wrist positions will add to the natural waddle. Frame 1 will show the arms positioned slightly to the left, Frame 2 shifts to the right, and Frame 3 returns to the left, creating a looping animation that can be repeated.  Frame 4 will be a slightly more forward position, and Frame 5 will return the arms to a neutral position to make a complete loop.

frames.beat: arms hang low, ready for the waddle
swaying gently to the left, a penguin's gait
swaying smoothly to the right, the other side
a slight forward lean, picking up the pace
